content: أناَ وَ خُوياَ إشتَرَكناَ في نَادي وَادي دِجلَة
translations: eng:my brother and I joined digla's valley club

transcriptions.arabizi: 'ana wa chw|ya 'ishtarakna fi naedi waedi digla
